GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "4 ways to see quartz surfaces in a new vein", "If it seems like almost everyone you know is renovating right now, you're not imagining it. In these home-centric times, there's never been a better time to create the spaces you've always wanted to live in. Realising the kitchen or bathroom of your dreams begins with investing in high quality surfaces, the 'bones' of all good design. Enter Smartstone. Its leading range of 36 quartz surfaces engineered for modern living is the choice of a long A-list of local and international designers and architects for benchtops, bathrooms vanities and loads more applications – with good reason. Smartstone's seriously beautiful veined quartz surfaces perfectly replicate natural stone such as marble, yet are more durable, more affordable and more sustainable than marble. Smartstone's veined quartz surfaces are a popular choice for kitchen benchtop designs, such as waterfall edges and splashbacks, where the vein can be seamlessly matched. In bathrooms, an in-demand floating vanity in a veined Smartstone surface makes a visually striking focal point in the space. Veined marble looks great with every existing style and can be fused in effortlessly with just about all accessories. So, which to choose? A soft grey. Pelle Grigio is a gorgeous quartz surface with a mottled texture and fine vein on a pale grey backdrop. A versatile addition to Smartstone's Paris collection, Pelle Grigio makes a sophisticated foil for on-trend interior colours, such as dusty teal and moody green-grey hues. Minimal white. Love white? Be inspired by Bianco Onix in Smartstone's Santorini collection with its gentle vein sweeping across a brilliant white background. Team Bianco Onix with the latest matte white tapware to create a minimal mood with a layer of textural veining. Cream with a twist. If you're drawn to the current trend for earthy, organic tones and materials, say hola to Dolce Vita Crema in your kitchen or bathroom. With its pale, gentle vein on a warm, creamy background, this surface is housed in Smartstone's Toledo collection, a palette inspired by the sun-baked stones of this enchanting Spanish citadel. A glowing white. Amani Classico brings the magnificence of Italian marble to Smartstone's Milan collection with its refined grey veining on a luminous white background. Such surface styles are making a popular pairing with 2020's pale rosy pink, giving marble-style surfaces a glamorous, contemporary edge. Visit: smartstone.com.au"
